response.justification: While Bogdan meets the minimum requirement of 15 years in software engineering and has valuable entrepreneurial experience, he lacks the deep, recognized AI/ML expertise required for a Director-level Principal role. His background is primarily in full-stack and web development, with only recent, limited exposure to AI infrastructure tooling, falling short of the strategic AI advisory and advanced product differentiation expectations.
strengths: Exceeds the minimum requirement of 15 years of software engineering experience across diverse tech stacks.
Demonstrated entrepreneurial and startup experience as the founder of GISCollective.
Strong background in developer tooling, infrastructure, open-source contributions, and software craftsmanship.
concerns: Lacks the required Director-level strategic leadership and recognized expertise in AI/ML.
Does not hold a preferred advanced degree (Master's or PhD) in an AI-related field.
Limited evidence of advising strategic enterprise customers on cutting-edge cloud and AI adoption.
